chosen_action.title: How to Structure Autonomous AI Agent Workflows for Production Reliability

why_this_action.summary: Reused the strongest existing StackOverflow reliability draft as a live Ralph-Site proof asset because direct StackOverflow posting is not available from this runtime and the draft should not sit idle.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: primary_repo_flat_window and same-family overlap require a different executable lane
outreach-log.md: avoid another same-family outreach burst while current windows mature
market_intelligence_latest.json: preserve Codeberg-first positioning and reusable product truths
drafts/stackoverflow_answer_handoff_packet_latest.md: existing StackOverflow draft should be posted or reused before the lane is regenerated

measurement_contract.success_metric: qualified visits to the new post and any attributable Codeberg star/watch/fork movement within 14 days
measurement_contract.replacement_condition: if this high-intent reuse asset shows no visible reuse or repo movement after the current measurement windows close, replace it with a different executable demand-capture surface instead of another prep packet
